zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Heyford於1230年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾海易福德時，她的父親Roger de Heyford30歲，母親Margaret de Gobion26歲。她於1248年與Hugh de Morewick在英國諾圖波藍德瓦可沃斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1300年在英國諾圖波藍德莫維其可享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes de Heyford于1230年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾海易福德时，她的父亲Roger de Heyford30岁，母亲Margaret de Gobion26岁。她于1248年与Hugh de Morewick在英国諾圖波藍德瓦可沃斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1300年在英国諾圖波藍德莫維其可享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Heyford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Hayford
meanings: habitational name from Nether and Upper Heyford (Northamptonshire), Lower and Upper Heyford (Oxfordshire), Hayford in Buckfastleigh (Devon), or from unidentified minor places in other counties called Hayford, all named with Old English hēg ‘hay’ or (ge)hæg ‘fence, enclosure’ + ford ‘ford’.
variant of Hawford, itself a variant of Halford , with the common dialect pronunciation of -aw- as -ay- or -ey-.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Heyford was born in 1230, in Heyford, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Roger de Heyford, was 30 and her mother, Margaret de Gobion, was 26. She married Hugh de Morewick in 1248, in Warkworth, Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in 1300, in Morwick, Northumberland, England, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes de Heyford est née en 1230, à Heyford, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Heyford, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Gobion, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh de Morewick en 1248, à Warkworth, Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1300, à Morwick, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes de Heyford 1230 in Heyford, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger de Heyford 30 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Gobion 26. Sie hat 1248 in Warkworth, Northumberland, England Hugh de Morewick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1300 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Morwick, Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Heyford è nata il nel 1230 nel Heyford, Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, Roger de Heyford, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Gobion, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Hugh de Morewick nel 1248, nel Warkworth, Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1300, nel Morwick, Northumberland, England, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Heyfordが1230年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアヘイフォードで生まれた時，父Roger de Heyfordは30歳，母Margaret de Gobionは26歳であった。1248年にイギリスノースウンバーランドワークウオルスでHugh de Morewickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1300年にイギリスノースウンバーランドモーウィックで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Heyford(이)가 1230년 영국 노르섬프토실르 헤이퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Heyford(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Gobion(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1248년 영국 노르스벌랜드 워k워스에서 Hugh de Morewick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1300년 영국 노르스벌랜드 모윅에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Heyford nasceu em 1230, em Heyford, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Heyford, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Gobion, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh de Morewick em 1248, em Warkworth, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1300, em Morwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Heyford родилась в 1230 г. в местности хифорд, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger de Heyford было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Gobion, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh de Morewick в 1248 г. в местности варкворт, нортумбирланд, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1300 г. в местности морвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes de Heyford nació en 1230, en Heyford, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger de Heyford, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Margaret de Gobion, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Hugh de Morewick en 1248, en Warkworth, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1300, en Morwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años.
